title: Toggle and Hold Sneak/Sprint
description: A simple mod to add dedicated toggle/hold sneak/sprint keys.
body:
![Requires Fabric API](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/requires/fabric-api/cozy.png) ![Available on Modrinth](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/modrinth/cozy.png)


# Toggle and Hold Sneak/Sprint

## what is this

here's an explainer video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EPGFGpSo0nc" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

made by me

## i don't like watching videos. what is this in text form


A 1.21.3+ port of the mod [Toggle Sneak & Sprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-sneak-sprint). Allows you to assign separate keys for "hold" sneaking/sprinting, so you can choose whatever method is most convinient.

(Also... that mod had a pretty jank way of setting your sprint. It would force you into it regardless of direction, which would get you banned on nearly every Minecraft server running an anticheat. 😨)

## great. how do i use it

Set the keys under "Movement":

![Movement section in controls](https://i.draw.rest/u/k71yJT.png)
